events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: commercial HVAC-R brazing & evacuation. Observed: vacuum not held at target microns (decay test - read gauge, FD). Work rough-complete. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since vacuum decay test failed (not held at target microns), evacuation non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk? If refrigerant system not properly evacuated, moisture/non-condensables can cause damage, acid, inefficient, potential leaks. Commercial project. Risk high? Could be medium/high. Since not holding vacuum indicates leak or contamination; if charged could be environmental/operational. But at rough-complete, not charged. Risk medium? Need choose. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 80%. Value numeric reading? Not given; use 0. Confidence high 0.95. Findings: vacuum decay test failed, system unable to hold target microns indicating leak or contamination/moisture. Actions: locate and repair leak(s), replace damaged components, re-evacuate, perform standing vacuum/ decay test to manufacturer spec, verify with micron gauge, document. References: EPA 608 (proper evacuation levels), ACCA, mfr specs. Need include order/workable/sound_source/event_time/rate default empty/zero. Workable maybe empty. Need ensure JSON valid.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Vacuum decay test failed: system did not hold target micron level.",
    "Indicates probable leak path, trapped moisture, or non-condensables in the refrigerant circuit.",
    "Evacuation does not meet manufacturer or industry acceptance criteria."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Pressurize and leak-check the entire refrigerant circuit to locate leak(s).",
    "Repair or replace defective brazed joints, fittings, or components as needed.",
    "Re-evacuate the system to manufacturer-specified target microns using a deep vacuum pump and micron gauge.",
    "Repeat standing vacuum/decay test and confirm the vacuum holds at the required micron level.",
    "Document final evacuation readings and inspection results before charging or closing in."
  ],
  "rationale": "A refrigeration system that cannot hold the specified vacuum during a decay test is not properly evacuated and is not ready for refrigerant charge. It violates manufacturer requirements and accepted HVAC-R practice because residual moisture, air, or leaks will degrade performance, cause acid formation, and can damage compressors. The work must be corrected and re-tested.",
  "references": [
    "EPA 608 - proper evacuation requirements for refrigerant systems",
    "ACCA standards - acceptable evacuation and dehydration practices",
    "Manufacturer specifications - target micron levels and vacuum hold/decay procedures"
  ]
}
